sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10254" key="a)ntiparablhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιπαρα-βλητέον</orth>, <sense id="n10254.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must compare,</tr_> prob. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-τόν</foreign> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.216</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
